howItWorks.intro: This salary comparison calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Compare adjusted values for true purchasing power
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How do I compare salaries in different cities?
faq.answer: Divide each salary by the city's cost of living index, then compare. A $100K salary at COL 150 (SF) equals $66.7K in purchasing power. A $75K salary at COL 100 (average city) provides more actual buying power.

faq.question: Should I factor in state taxes?
faq.answer: Absolutely. States like Texas, Florida, and Washington have no income tax. California and New York charge 9-13%. This can mean $5,000-15,000+ difference in take-home pay on the same salary.

faq.question: What else should I consider besides salary?
faq.answer: Benefits value ($5K-30K), commute costs and time, career growth opportunities, quality of life, proximity to family, housing market trajectory, and the complete compensation package (equity, bonus, 401k match).

faq.question: Is the Salary Comparison Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Salary Comparison Calculator?
sections.body: The Salary Comparison Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your salary offer 1, city 1 col index, salary offer 2, you get instant results including adjusted salary 1, adjusted salary 2, better offer. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting adjusted salary 1 right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?

It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
